creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
On Wed, Mar 09, 2011 at 12:00:30 +0100, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/mutt-devel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/155404 has just been submitted.

This is an incompatibility between a recent openssl using default options and
the system kerberos library libhx509 as kerberos uses openssl libraries. This
can be resolved by using the WITH_MD2 option when building the openssl port
and has nothing to do with the mutt-devel port. Perhaps the default options
for the openssl port should be changed as long as the system kerberos uses
MD2.

Udo
